summary: After every sensitive WriteFile/MkdirAll/O_CREATE on cache/store/config/profile/feedback paths, added os.Chmod to 0o700 (dirs) / 0o600 (files).
reason: os.WriteFile / os.OpenFile(O_CREATE) / os.MkdirAll only apply the perm bits when CREATING; a dir/file left over from an older 0o755/0o644 build kept its world-readable mode forever. The prior perms patches only hardened newly-created paths. Chmod re-secures the existing artifacts on the next write.
validated_outcome: go build/vet/test pass; verify-skill passes. store.go's db file + WAL/SHM sidecars were already chmod'd; this adds the missing dir chmod and re-secures the config/profile/feedback/cache files. deliver.go left at 0o755 (user-chosen output sink, not a sensitive cache/store path).
